test_result.note: 1 failure is pre-existing git-utils.test.ts (getGitStatus dirty detection), unrelated to Issue #505

criteria_results.criterion: Markdownプレビュー内の相対パスリンクをクリックすると、対象ファイルが新しいタブで開く
criteria_results.evidence: MarkdownPreview.tsx handleLinkClick dispatches onOpenFile with resolveRelativePath result for 'relative' links. Test MarkdownPreview.test.tsx confirms onOpenFile called with 'docs/readme.md' for './readme.md' link.

criteria_results.criterion: HTMLプレビュー内の相対パスリンクをクリックすると、対象ファイルが新しいタブで開く（interactiveモードのみ）
criteria_results.evidence: HtmlPreview.tsx registers postMessage listener only when sandboxLevel==='interactive'. LINK_CLICK_SCRIPT injected into iframe intercepts clicks. handleLinkFromIframe resolves relative paths and calls onOpenFile. Test HtmlPreview.test.tsx confirms onOpenFile('docs/readme.md') called on postMessage.

criteria_results.criterion: 外部URLリンクはブラウザの新しいタブで開く
criteria_results.evidence: Both MarkdownPreview and HtmlPreview call window.open(sanitized, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer') for 'external' links. Tests confirm window.open called with correct args.

criteria_results.criterion: #で始まるアンカーリンクはタブを開かず、プレビュー内でスクロールする
criteria_results.evidence: classifyLink returns 'anchor' for '#' prefixed hrefs. MarkdownPreview handleLinkClick 'anchor' case breaks without preventDefault (browser handles scroll). Test confirms onOpenFile not called for anchor links.

criteria_results.criterion: ファイルタブが6個以上の場合、先頭5タブがタブバーに表示され、残りはドロップダウンから選択可能
criteria_results.evidence: FilePanelTabs.tsx VISIBLE_TAB_COUNT=5. visibleTabs=tabs.slice(0, 5), overflowTabs=tabs.slice(5). Dropdown button with ChevronDown and '+N' count renders when overflowTabs.length > 0.

criteria_results.criterion: ドロップダウンから選択したタブが先頭に移動する（MOVE_TO_FRONT）
criteria_results.evidence: handleDropdownSelect calls onMoveToFront(path). useFileTabs MOVE_TO_FRONT reducer moves tab to index 0 and sets activeIndex=0.

criteria_results.criterion: タブバー内タブクリック時はタブ順序が変わらない（ACTIVATE_TAB）
criteria_results.evidence: TabButton handleClick calls onActivate (ACTIVATE_TAB), not onMoveToFront. ACTIVATE_TAB reducer only changes activeIndex without reordering.
useFileTabs.ts MAX_FILE_TABS=30 (line 20). OPEN_FILE reducer checks state.tabs.length >= MAX_FILE_TABS. openFile returns 'limit_reached' when at capacity.

criteria_results.criterion: タブ上限30到達時にリンクをクリックした場合、Toast通知でフィードバック
criteria_results.evidence: WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx handleOpenFile checks fileTabs.openFile result and calls showTabLimitToast() on 'limit_reached'. Same pattern in handleFileSelect and handleFilePathClick.

criteria_results.criterion: rehype-sanitizeが相対パスのhrefを除去しないこと
criteria_results.evidence: REHYPE_SANITIZE_SCHEMA uses allowlist regex /^(?:#|mailto:|tel:|https?:\/\/|(?![a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9+.-]*:))/ which allows relative paths. Test link-utils.test.ts confirms relative paths match. MarkdownPreview.test.tsx confirms href='./readme.md' preserved in rendered link.

criteria_results.criterion: postMessage受信時にorigin検証が行われる
criteria_results.evidence: HtmlPreview.tsx handler checks event.origin !== 'null' and returns early. Test HtmlPreview.test.tsx confirms origin='https://evil.com' is rejected.

criteria_results.criterion: postMessageメッセージスキーマ（commandmate:link-click）の検証が行われる
criteria_results.evidence: Handler validates data.type === 'commandmate:link-click' and typeof data.href === 'string'. Test confirms wrong type 'other-message' is ignored.

criteria_results.criterion: postMessageリスナーがコンポーネントアンマウント時にremoveEventListenerで解除される
criteria_results.evidence: useEffect cleanup returns () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler). Test HtmlPreview.test.tsx 'should clean up listener on unmount' confirms removeEventListener called.

criteria_results.criterion: SafeモードではpostMessageリスナーが登録されないこと
criteria_results.evidence: useEffect guard: if (sandboxLevel !== 'interactive') return. Test 'should not register listener in safe mode' confirms 0 message listeners in safe mode.

criteria_results.criterion: Toast メッセージはMAX_FILE_TABS定数を参照した動的メッセージであること
criteria_results.evidence: showTabLimitToast uses template literal: `Maximum ${MAX_FILE_TABS} file tabs. Close a tab first.` with imported MAX_FILE_TABS constant.
254 test files passed, 5075 tests passed. Only 1 pre-existing failure in git-utils.test.ts unrelated to Issue #505.
ESLint output: 'No ESLint warnings or errors'

design_policy_findings.evidence: src/lib/link-utils.ts created as shared module imported by both MarkdownPreview.tsx and HtmlPreview.tsx
classifyLink exported from link-utils.ts, classifies anchor/external/relative. Used in both MarkdownPreview and HtmlPreview.
resolveRelativePath uses new URL() for path normalization. Comment explicitly states: '[DR1-005] new URL() resolves away .. so no includes(..) check needed.'
showTabLimitToast callback in WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx uses MAX_FILE_TABS in dynamic template literal message.
REHYPE_SANITIZE_SCHEMA uses allowlist regex that explicitly permits http, https, mailto, tel, anchors, and relative paths while rejecting all unknown schemes.
sanitizeHref validates max length 2048 and rejects control characters. Used in both MarkdownPreview (handleLinkClick) and HtmlPreview (handleLinkFromIframe).

overall_assessment: All 17 acceptance criteria passed. TypeScript compilation, ESLint, and unit tests all pass (the single test failure is a pre-existing git-utils issue unrelated to #505). All 6 design policy findings (DR1-001, DR1-002, DR1-005, DR1-010, DR4-001, DR4-003) are properly addressed. The implementation correctly provides: (1) shared link-utils module with classifyLink, resolveRelativePath, sanitizeHref, and REHYPE_SANITIZE_SCHEMA; (2) MarkdownPreview link handling with relative/external/anchor classification; (3) HtmlPreview postMessage-based link handling with origin validation, schema validation, and safe-mode exclusion; (4) tab UI improvements with VISIBLE_TAB_COUNT=5 dropdown, MOVE_TO_FRONT reducer, MAX_FILE_TABS=30 limit with Toast feedback; (5) proper prop drilling of onOpenFile through FilePanelSplit -> FilePanelTabs -> FilePanelContent -> MarkdownEditor/HtmlPreview; (6) comprehensive test coverage across link-utils, MarkdownPreview, and HtmlPreview.
